title: Organigram (OGI) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Organigram (OGI) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript. Earnings Call Date: February 13, 2024. Period: Q1 2024 (ended December 31, 2023). Financial Results: Financial Results: Organigram delivered positive adjusted EBITDA and cash flow from operations of $7.7 million. Product Performance: Contributing to these improvements were growth in the pre-roll category and the reintroduction of Edison JOLTS to the market, with $2.9 million in shipped sales for Edison JOLTS in Q1. Gross Margins: The company delivered adjusted gross margins which returned to previously reported levels. Strategic Focus: One of the company's key domestic areas of focus for fiscal 2024 was to increase share of the vape category, and Organigram launched new vaporization hardware resulting from a strategic investment in Greentank.
